purpose: Reduce hallucination when answering questions about BespokeSynth architecture and modules.

truth_levels.high: directly supported by source code or official docs lines inspected
truth_levels.medium: supported by official docs excerpt but not yet cross-checked against module class
truth_levels.low: module name/category listed; behavior still needs extraction from official docs or source

source_policy.do_not_guess_rule: If confidence is low, answer with the module category and say source expansion is required before giving wiring/behavior advice.

core_classes.IDrawableModule: Base visible/canvas module: rendering, UI controls, patch cable sources, save/load, category, enabled/minimized/pinned state.
core_classes.ModuleFactory: Registry that maps string type names to module creator/capability/category metadata and returns spawnable modules.
core_classes.IAudioSource: Audio-producing interface with Process(double time), target lookup, viz buffer.
core_classes.IAudioReceiver: Audio-receiving interface with ChannelBuffer input buffer and input mode.
core_classes.IAudioProcessor: Combines IAudioReceiver and IAudioSource for audio effects/processors.
core_classes.INoteSource: Sends notes through NoteOutput and manages note source patching.
core_classes.VSTPlugin: Bespoke wrapper module for external plugin processors via JUCE AudioProcessor.

new_native_module_risk: Native modules are not pure drop-in files.

A new native module commonly requires new .h/.cpp, ModuleFactory include, REGISTER call, class Create/CanCreate/AcceptsAudio/AcceptsNotes/AcceptsPulses, category, UI controls, process path, save/load, and build integration.
For AI-generated modules, prefer external plugin template first; do not modify ModuleFactory until the module is stable.

ai_module_strategy.recommended_v0: BespokeSynth as host/canvas; AI generates external VST3/LV2 plugin templates, Bespoke loads them as plugin nodes.
ai_module_strategy.avoid_v0: AI directly edits Bespoke native ModuleFactory or arbitrary internal module code.
ai_module_strategy.upgrade_path: Promote only stable, frequently used external plugins into native C++ modules after manual review.

create_modules: drag items from top bar menus
right-click and type module name then drag from popup
hold first letter of module and drag from popup
drag a cable into space and spawn a connecting module
patching: drag circle from bottom of a module to target
drag cable and press backspace to unpatch
shift-drag modules/circles for quick patch behavior
ui_controls: click/drag slider; hold shift for fine tune
type numeric value/expression into slider and press enter
